entities.description: As a subsection of '6附图最小系统设计', this section provides the design details of the minimal system, which is part of the hardware manual for the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board.
Refers to the design of the minimal system, which is the core focus of this section.
Refers to the accompanying diagrams or figures that illustrate the minimal system design, as described in this section.

relations.description: The concept of '最小系统设计' is the primary topic of section 6附图最小系统设计.
The concept of '附图' is a supporting element of section 6附图最小系统设计.
